problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
